reading.title: Woman Down
reading.author: Colleen Hoover
reading.blurb: Colleen Hoover's twisty 2026 thriller — a burned-out novelist hides away at a remote lake cabin to write her next book, and after meeting a local detective the line between her fiction and real life starts to blur.

picks.title: Rooms
picks.author: James Rubart
picks.blurb: On a rainy spring day in Seattle, young software tycoon Micah Taylor receives a cryptic twenty-five-year-old letter from a great-uncle he never knew. The letter claims a home awaits him on the Oregon coast that will turn his world upside down. Suspecting a prank, Micah arrives to discover a stunning new house. But when bizarre things begin happening in its rooms, he learns the home is far more than a house—it is a physical manifestation of his soul. As Micah confronts painful truths from his past, God uses the house to heal his deepest wounds and lead him toward an astonishing new destiny.
